# tw-animate-css

> Pure CSS animation utility classes for Tailwind CSS v4. No JavaScript runtime needed.
> Package: tw-animate-css (https://github.com/Wombosvideo/tw-animate-css)

## Installation

```bash
pnpm add tw-animate-css
```

```css
/* In your main CSS file */
@import "tailwindcss";
@import "tw-animate-css";
```

## How Animations Work

Animations require a **base class** plus one or more **effect classes**. Multiple effects can be composed together on a single element.

### Base Classes (required)

- `animate-in` — triggers enter animation
- `animate-out` — triggers exit animation

### Enter Effect Classes (use with `animate-in`)

- `fade-in` — fade from transparent to opaque
- `zoom-in` — scale up from smaller size
- `spin-in` — rotate into view
- `blur-in` — unblur into focus
- `slide-in-from-top` — slide down from above
- `slide-in-from-bottom` — slide up from below
- `slide-in-from-left` — slide in from left
- `slide-in-from-right` — slide in from right

### Exit Effect Classes (use with `animate-out`)

- `fade-out` — fade from opaque to transparent
- `zoom-out` — scale down to smaller size
- `spin-out` — rotate out of view
- `blur-out` — blur out of focus
- `slide-out-to-top` — slide up and out
- `slide-out-to-bottom` — slide down and out
- `slide-out-to-left` — slide out to left
- `slide-out-to-right` — slide out to right

### Ready-to-Use Animations (no base class needed)

These are standalone classes with built-in keyframes:

- `animate-accordion-down` — accordion expand downward
- `animate-accordion-up` — accordion collapse upward
- `animate-collapsible-down` — collapsible expand downward
- `animate-collapsible-up` — collapsible collapse upward
- `animate-caret-blink` — blinking caret/cursor effect

## Duration Modifiers

Control animation speed with Tailwind duration utilities:

- `duration-150` — 150ms
- `duration-300` — 300ms
- `duration-500` — 500ms (recommended default)
- `duration-700` — 700ms
- `duration-1000` — 1000ms

Any Tailwind `duration-*` class works (e.g., `duration-200`, `duration-[400ms]`).

## Easing Modifiers

Control animation curve with Tailwind ease utilities:

- `ease-linear` — constant speed
- `ease-in` — slow start
- `ease-out` — slow end (recommended default)
- `ease-in-out` — slow start and end

## Composing Animations

Multiple effect classes can be combined with a single base class. Effects are additive — they all play simultaneously.

### Pattern

```
<base-class> <effect-1> [effect-2] [effect-N] [duration] [easing]
```

### Enter Combo Examples

```html
<!-- Fade + Zoom In -->
<div class="animate-in fade-in zoom-in duration-500 ease-out">

<!-- Fade + Slide Up -->
<div class="animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom duration-500 ease-out">

<!-- Fade + Spin + Zoom (triple combo) -->
<div class="animate-in fade-in spin-in zoom-in duration-500 ease-out">

<!-- Blur + Slide Left -->
<div class="animate-in blur-in slide-in-from-left duration-500 ease-out">

<!-- All four enter effects combined -->
<div class="animate-in fade-in zoom-in spin-in blur-in duration-700 ease-in-out">

<!-- Fade + Slide from corner (two slides) -->
<div class="animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-top slide-in-from-left duration-300 ease-out">
```

### Exit Combo Examples

```html
<!-- Fade + Zoom Out -->
<div class="animate-out fade-out zoom-out duration-500 ease-out">

<!-- Fade + Slide Up Out -->
<div class="animate-out fade-out slide-out-to-top duration-500 ease-out">

<!-- Spin + Fade Out -->
<div class="animate-out fade-out spin-out duration-500 ease-out">

<!-- Blur + Slide Right Out -->
<div class="animate-out blur-out slide-out-to-right duration-300 ease-in">
```

## All Valid Combinations

### Single Enter Effects (8)

```
animate-in fade-in
animate-in zoom-in
animate-in spin-in
animate-in blur-in
animate-in slide-in-from-top
animate-in slide-in-from-bottom
animate-in slide-in-from-left
animate-in slide-in-from-right
```

### Single Exit Effects (8)

```
animate-out fade-out
animate-out zoom-out
animate-out spin-out
animate-out blur-out
animate-out slide-out-to-top
animate-out slide-out-to-bottom
animate-out slide-out-to-left
animate-out slide-out-to-right
```

### Common Two-Effect Enter Combos

```
animate-in fade-in zoom-in
animate-in fade-in spin-in
animate-in fade-in blur-in
animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-top
animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom
animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-left
animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-right
animate-in zoom-in spin-in
animate-in zoom-in blur-in
animate-in zoom-in slide-in-from-top
animate-in zoom-in slide-in-from-bottom
animate-in zoom-in slide-in-from-left
animate-in zoom-in slide-in-from-right
animate-in spin-in blur-in
animate-in spin-in slide-in-from-top
animate-in spin-in slide-in-from-bottom
animate-in spin-in slide-in-from-left
animate-in spin-in slide-in-from-right
animate-in blur-in slide-in-from-top
animate-in blur-in slide-in-from-bottom
animate-in blur-in slide-in-from-left
animate-in blur-in slide-in-from-right
animate-in slide-in-from-top slide-in-from-left
animate-in slide-in-from-top slide-in-from-right
animate-in slide-in-from-bottom slide-in-from-left
animate-in slide-in-from-bottom slide-in-from-right
```

### Common Two-Effect Exit Combos

```
animate-out fade-out zoom-out
animate-out fade-out spin-out
animate-out fade-out blur-out
animate-out fade-out slide-out-to-top
animate-out fade-out slide-out-to-bottom
animate-out fade-out slide-out-to-left
animate-out fade-out slide-out-to-right
animate-out zoom-out spin-out
animate-out zoom-out blur-out
animate-out zoom-out slide-out-to-top
animate-out zoom-out slide-out-to-bottom
animate-out zoom-out slide-out-to-left
animate-out zoom-out slide-out-to-right
animate-out spin-out blur-out
animate-out spin-out slide-out-to-top
animate-out spin-out slide-out-to-bottom
animate-out spin-out slide-out-to-left
animate-out spin-out slide-out-to-right
animate-out blur-out slide-out-to-top
animate-out blur-out slide-out-to-bottom
animate-out blur-out slide-out-to-left
animate-out blur-out slide-out-to-right
animate-out slide-out-to-top slide-out-to-left
animate-out slide-out-to-top slide-out-to-right
animate-out slide-out-to-bottom slide-out-to-left
animate-out slide-out-to-bottom slide-out-to-right
```

### Three-Effect Enter Combos (popular picks)

```
animate-in fade-in zoom-in spin-in
animate-in fade-in zoom-in blur-in
animate-in fade-in zoom-in slide-in-from-bottom
animate-in fade-in spin-in slide-in-from-left
animate-in fade-in blur-in slide-in-from-right
animate-in zoom-in spin-in blur-in
animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom slide-in-from-left
animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-top slide-in-from-right
```

### Three-Effect Exit Combos (popular picks)

```
animate-out fade-out zoom-out spin-out
animate-out fade-out zoom-out blur-out
animate-out fade-out zoom-out slide-out-to-top
animate-out fade-out spin-out slide-out-to-right
animate-out fade-out blur-out slide-out-to-left
animate-out zoom-out spin-out blur-out
animate-out fade-out slide-out-to-top slide-out-to-left
animate-out fade-out slide-out-to-bottom slide-out-to-right
```

## Replay Pattern (JavaScript)

To replay an animation programmatically, remove the classes, force a reflow, then re-add them:

```ts
function replay(el: HTMLElement, classes: string): void {
  const classList = classes.split(" ");
  classList.forEach((c) => el.classList.remove(c));
  void el.offsetWidth; // force reflow
  classList.forEach((c) => el.classList.add(c));
}

// Usage
replay(element, "animate-in fade-in zoom-in duration-500 ease-out");
```

## Rules

- Always include a base class (`animate-in` or `animate-out`) when using effect classes.
- Do NOT mix enter effects with `animate-out` or exit effects with `animate-in`.
- Multiple effects of the same type compose additively (e.g., two slide directions create diagonal movement).
- Ready-to-use animations (`animate-accordion-*`, `animate-collapsible-*`, `animate-caret-blink`) are standalone — no base class needed.
- Duration and easing modifiers are optional; browser defaults apply without them.
